description: Rules for how agents should report file sets in answers

groupable_families.glob: REPLACE: glob pattern for a homogeneous file set (e.g., src/models/*.ts)
groupable_families.report_as: REPLACE: family label with verified count (e.g., 'model files (~25 files)')
groupable_families.reason: REPLACE: why these files should be grouped, not listed individually

never_enumerate_individually.glob: REPLACE: glob for generated/derived files (e.g., dist/**, *.lock)
never_enumerate_individually.reason: REPLACE: why this file set has no architectural value

authoritative: REPLACE: paths that are source-of-truth for architecture decisions
derived_or_generated: REPLACE: paths that are generated from authoritative sources

_rules.groupable_families: Count must be verified with git ls-files | grep ... | wc -l. Use ~ prefix for approximate counts. Must be within ±20% of actual.
_rules.never_enumerate_individually: Only for files with zero architectural value. Do not suppress files agents might need to edit.
_rules.authoritative: Files where changes originate. If in doubt, it's authoritative.
_rules.validation: After filling, remove all REPLACE markers and _EXAMPLE entries.
